title: Mechanosensitive channel MscL (2OAR) in POPE bilayer, 100 ns MD

C1.note: 2OAR pentamer fetched (raw_pdbs/2OAR.pdb), His-tag + Au stripped, ACE/NME caps per chain, embedded in POPE bilayer (293 lipids) via packmol-memgen, tLEaP rebuilt system/system.prmtop (~133k atoms, net charge 0 per tleap.log). Box 99.97x99.97x131.0 A; prod density 1.022 g/cc — topology sane, no silent residue drops.

C2.note: PLAN.md gives 4-tier FF table (ff14SB Tier-2 manual, LIPID21 Tier-1/2 Dickson 2022, TIP3P method-mandated by LIPID21 validation, K+/Cl- 0.15 M Tier-1), no hardcoded defaults; barostat=1 / cut=10 / ntp=1 each justified to manual+Dickson; literature precedent (PMID 37292176, 35765322) and propka3 protonation documented; PLAN approved before sbatch.

C3.note: Full chain min1/min2/heat/equil1-3/prod completed. prod.mdout shows NSTEP=50,000,000 (100 ns) AVERAGES: TEMP 310.01 K, Density 1.0221 g/cc, stable energies (EPtot -342603, no NaN/blowup). RMSD plateau 2.4 A (drift 0.19 A, converged).

C4.note: Correct observables for the prompt: backbone RMSD (analysis/rmsd_bb.dat), per-residue RMSF, pore minimum-radius profile (gate_radius.dat ~3.0 A), gate-cylinder water count for dewetting (water_gate.dat ~0.01), pore-lining residue ranking (Val21 symmetric across 5 chains), plus membrane thickness/APL build checks. APL overestimate explicitly caveated.

C5.note: Paper (PMID 9856938) confirms homopentamer with pore narrowing to an 'occluded hydrophobic apex that may act as the channel gate'. Agent reproduces: channel stays closed (RMSD 2.4 A, no opening), pentameric symmetry maintained (Val21 constriction in all 5 subunits), hydrophobic gate occludes pore (min radius ~3 A at Val21) and is dewetted (~0 waters). Matches expected closed-state/hydrophobic-gate result. Minor: secondary gate residue reported as Leu17 rather than key's Leu24, but the dominant symmetric gate (Val21) and the physics agree.
